title: Fees and court costs
doc_html:
§77. Fees and court costs

            Assistive outpatient treatment proceedings shall be exempt from charges for filing fees or taxing of court costs.

            Acts 2021, No. 329, §1.
doc_text:
§77.  Fees and court costs
Assistive outpatient treatment proceedings shall be exempt from charges for filing
fees or taxing of court costs.
Acts 2021, No. 329, §1.
